description: Reuse the original global ME and BLESSINGS objects for natural SELF and VOICE commands without adding object-table entries or removing original synonyms.

replacements.new:
<OBJECT BLESSINGS
	(IN GLOBAL-OBJECTS)
	(SYNONYM BLESSINGS GRACES VOICE WORDS)
	(DESC "your voice")
	(FLAGS NDESCBIT)
	(ACTION ABS-VOICE-F)>

replacements.old:
<OBJECT ME
	(IN GLOBAL-OBJECTS)
	(SYNONYM ME MYSELF SELF CRETIN)
	(DESC "you")
	(FLAGS ACTORBIT)
	(ACTION CRETIN-FCN)>
replacements.new:
<OBJECT ME
	(IN GLOBAL-OBJECTS)
	(SYNONYM ME MYSELF SELF CRETIN)
	(DESC "you")
	(FLAGS ACTORBIT)
	(ACTION ABS-ME-F)>
